issue_body_preview: I have a setup where I use generated docs as part of my automated testing: I take screenshots of parts of the docs page using phantomjs page.render() and compare them to find any visual regressions. It works in 4.1.0, but breaks when I update to 4.2.x -- my screenshots come back completely white as
test_description_zh: 在浏览器中打开 React Styleguidist 生成的文档首页，观察页面是否正常渲染出组件文档内容（包括组件示例、标题、说明文字等）。
expected_result_zh: 文档首页应正常渲染所有组件文档内容，页面不应为空白，组件示例、标题和说明文字等元素均应正确显示。
